page_metadata.biotools__summary: SSA (Signal Search Analysis) is a software package for the analysis of nucleic acid sequence motifs that are postionally correlated with a functional site (e.g a transcription or translation initiation site).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SSA (Signal Search Analysis) is a software package for the analysis of nucleic acid sequence motifs that are postionally correlated with a functional site (e.g a transcription or translation initiation site).
